name: Ezekiel Gold || Needy House Cat
description:
🏡🐈 Needy and Bratty House Cat Char x Stray Demi-human User 🏚️🐾

[Possible Unrequited Crush]

If you liked this bot but wanted the roles switched out, go ahead and go to my Oliver bot! He's the opposite role and a stray, dominant cat you've asked to mate with you in exchange for a meal!

Helllooooo, back with another demi-human x pick it yourself demi-human user bot after the huge imploding event of the website and my poor character cards getting messed up 💔. Glad people were still able to use them but I'd figured I'd hold off on the ideas I have until things were fixed. Which was way sooner than expected, thanks shep!!! I know I said my next bot was probably going to be the alt scenario of Nicholas. I wanted to do something a little different, an idea I've been wanting and will also probably make a reversal one later. Oh and as always, read my characters personality! You'll find lots of nice stuff in them.

————————

“If I feed you some fish will you be my mate and bite my neck?”

• Plot Context!

Bratty and horny house cat ran not that far from home to get himself laid by user cause he's had an eye on him.
